title: Juno fumosa
taxonomy: Juno fumosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Juno, which is a small group of orchids. The specific epithet 'fumosa' refers to the plant's smoky or powdery appearance. Juno fumosa is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is often found growing in humid forests. Its classification is also supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small size and delicate flowers.
